tasks.subject: Task 0: feedback.js router — toast + gameEvent; generalise showToast
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create public/js/ui/feedback.js exposing toast(message,{variant}) (delegates to a now variant-aware showToast) and gameEvent(kind,{msg,selfElimActive}) that replicates EXACTLY socketClient's prior overlay/flash/confetti branching (behaviour-preserving, incl. the selfElimActive suppression; audio/haptics stay in the socket handler). Generalise showToast(msg,{variant='info'}={}) additively (classList.add('copy-toast--'+variant); the existing `toast.className='copy-toast'` reset prevents variant leak across reused elements). Re-export feedback.js from the ui.js barrel. No call-site wiring (zero app behaviour change).

**Files:** Modify server/.. NONE. Modify public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js:307-314 (showToast); Create public/js/ui/feedback.js; Modify public/js/ui.js:8 (barrel); Test client-tests/feedback-router.test.js (new).

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/feedback-router.test.js client-tests/

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui/feedback.js","public/js/ui/ui-notifications.js","public/js/ui.js","client-tests/feedback-router.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/feedback-router.test.js client-tests/","acceptanceCriteria":["showToast(msg) unchanged behaviour + adds copy-toast--info; {variant:'error'} adds copy-toast--error; no variant leak on reused element","feedback.toast delegates to showToast; gameEvent('elimination',{selfElimActive:false}) shows overlay (text+notification--elimination) AND .elimination-flash","gameEvent('elimination',{selfElimActive:true}) suppresses overlay but .elimination-flash still appears","gameEvent('win',...) removes prior .elimination-flash, shows .win-flash","import {toast,gameEvent} from ui.js resolves via barrel","full client-tests/ suite green (generalised showToast broke no caller)"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: CG-03 submission pill — submissionPill API + #submission-pill element + CSS
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Append a submissionPill state machine to feedback.js (checking(title) / searching() / clear(onlyMode); mode guard so searching can't stomp checking and a scoped clear('searching') leaves a checking pill intact; textContent only — no innerHTML). Add a static #submission-pill element to public/index.html after #hint-text (line 400), mirroring #peer-typing-indicator. Append minimal real CSS to public/css/06-states-anim.css (pill mirrors .peer-typing; toast --error/--success accents additive — base .copy-toast in 04-modals.css UNEDITED; --info intentionally has no rule). Do NOT touch 06-states-anim.css:1082/1085 or .self-elim-outs* (7.3 deferrals). No socket/app wiring yet.

**Files:** Modify public/js/ui/feedback.js (append submissionPill); Modify public/index.html (after :400); Modify public/css/06-states-anim.css (append at EOF); Test client-tests/submission-pill.test.js (new).

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/submission-pill.test.js client-tests/

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/ui/feedback.js","public/index.html","public/css/06-states-anim.css","client-tests/submission-pill.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/submission-pill.test.js client-tests/","acceptanceCriteria":["checking('Heat') -> #submission-pill .visible, textContent 'Checking: \"Heat\"'","searching() does not overwrite a checking-mode pill","clear() hides+empties; clear('searching') is a no-op while checking","crafted title rendered as text (no img element; no innerHTML)","04-modals.css base .copy-toast unedited; new rules only in 06-states-anim.css; 7.3-deferred lines untouched","full client-tests/ suite green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: wire socketClient/app through the router (integration + MI-01 delta + pill resolution)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Route the live flow through feedback.js. notification dispatcher: elim/win -> gameEvent (audio/haptics retained, behaviour-preserving), info -> toast(msg,{variant:'info'}) and NO centre overlay (the single MI-01 delta; delete the standalone showNotification line). submissionRejected -> toast(...,{variant:'error'}) + submissionPill.clear() (all retry/restore/hint code unchanged). predictionResult -> variant toasts (success/error/info; same text/timing). stateUpdate top -> submissionPill.clear() (idempotent resolution). autocompleteResults -> submissionPill.clear('searching') then renderAutocompleteResults. app.js submitMovie -> submissionPill.checking(movie) replacing the static 'Validating connection...' hint write; typeahead -> submissionPill.searching() on debounced emit + clear('searching') on the <2-char early return. Add toast/gameEvent/submissionPill to socketClient & app.js ui.js imports. No server change, no new event.

**Files:** Modify public/js/socketClient.js (import :11-22; notification :492-537; submissionRejected :653-698; predictionResult :617-631; stateUpdate top :258; autocompleteResults :704); Modify public/js/app.js (ui.js import; submitMovie :548-563; input handler :584-600); Test client-tests/feedback-wiring.test.js (new).

**Verify:** npx jest client-tests/feedback-wiring.test.js client-tests/ server/

```json:metadata
{"files":["public/js/socketClient.js","public/js/app.js","client-tests/feedback-wiring.test.js"],"verifyCommand":"npx jest client-tests/feedback-wiring.test.js client-tests/ server/","acceptanceCriteria":["notification kind:'info' -> .copy-toast.copy-toast--info AND #notification-overlay stays hidden (MI-01 delta)","notification kind:'elimination' -> overlay+notification--elimination + .elimination-flash (behaviour-preserving)","submissionRejected -> .copy-toast--error w/ message+tail; #movie-input re-enabled+originalInput restored; #submission-pill not visible","stateUpdate clears a checking pill; autocompleteResults clears searching but NOT a checking pill","app.js submitMovie calls submissionPill.checking(movie) replacing the static hint; typeahead drives searching()/clear('searching')","node -e import feedback.js -> load ok (no cycle)","npx jest client-tests/ server/ all green + coverage ratchet holds"]}
```
